title: Drag-and-Drop Format
text: Drag-and-Drop Format A Drag-and-Drop Format is Development Object that defines a default action, pop-up menu, and icon that can be used when performing drag-and-drop actions in the tree and picture widgets of forms. It is not used for drag-and-drop widgets. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: fmt Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: FormatName @ LibraryName @ Language .fmt URI format: lib: LibraryName . Language :fmt FormatName Specialization Drag-and-Drop Format specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a runtime library as parent. It has no child development objects.
